message:
fix(mail,transfer): correct Agent Mail project-key resolution and harden reservation-transfer rollback atomicity

Two related correctness fixes for multi-agent coordination:

**Project-key resolution fix (mail.go, git.go, handoff.go, session.go, config/project.go):**
New refineAgentMailProjectKey helper consults the saved
SessionAgentRegistry and SessionAgentInfo to find the real project
directory the agent registered under, replacing the stale inferred
working-dir. Wired into resolveAgentMailScopeWithPreference,
runGitStatus (via resolveGitAgentMailProjectKey),
resolveHandoffProjectDir, and updateSessionActivity.
LoadBestSessionAgent replaces LoadSessionAgent in several call sites.
ProjectIntegrations gains typed fields (AgentMailProjectKey,
AgentMailRegistered, AgentMailRegisteredAt) instead of loose TOML
strings, and buildAgentMailProjectUpdates extracted to always write
all four Agent Mail fields including clearing registered_at on
unregister.

**Reservation-transfer atomicity/rollback (handoff/transfer.go):**
attemptReservationTransfer gains targetAgentName parameter (resolved
agent, not session name). Rollback consolidated into rollbackTransfer
+ releaseGrantedReservations. Cleanup operations use fresh
newCleanupContext (10s timeout) instead of potentially-cancelled parent
context, preventing rollback failures when caller cancels mid-transfer.
Partial grants cleared and grant set to nil before retry to avoid
double-releasing. Rollback now triggered on any error after old
reservations are released, not only on conflict.

**Comprehensive tests:**
New tests in git_test.go, handoff_test.go, mail_test.go, setup_test.go,
and spawn_recovery_test.go cover project-key resolution paths and each
transfer failure/rollback scenario.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
